content: Just as the linguistic meaning of reflexion in high school English curricula frames it as a deliberate metacognitive act of reflecting on one’s own writing to align it with intended communication, LLM self-reflection mechanisms can be redesigned to mimic this structured, educational writing workflow rather than relying on ad-hoc inconsistent perspective comparison. This frames LLM self-reflection not as a specialized AI trick, but as a universal metacognitive skill that can be taught to LLMs using the same scaffolding we use to teach it to human students.
